requirement_topic.en: Radio Frequency Spectrum Conformity — MCA / CITA Frequency Management and Radio Equipment Standards
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电频率频谱合规——MCA / CITA频率管理与无线电设备标准
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電頻率頻譜合規——MCA / CITA頻率管理與無線電設備標準

summary.en: Radio equipment placed on the Mongolia market must operate within frequency bands allocated and licensed by CITA (Communications and Information Technology Authority) under Mongolia's national Radiofrequency Allocation Table. Mongolia's frequency planning follows a broadly CIS-region-influenced framework, shaped by its historical infrastructure and its geographic position between China and Russia. The 2.4 GHz ISM band (2400–2483.5 MHz) is generally available for Wi-Fi (IEEE 802.11 b/g/n/ax) and Bluetooth devices without individual frequency licensing, subject to CITA type approval of the device. In the 5 GHz band, channels corresponding to W52 (5150–5250 MHz) and W53 (5250–5350 MHz) are restricted to indoor use only, following practices similar to Russian and CIS-region regulations; W56 (5470–5725 MHz) may be permitted with additional power limits. Cellular frequency allocations (4G LTE and 5G NR) are licensed by CITA to network operators; device compatibility with Mongolia operator bands must be verified. Equipment must not exceed CITA-specified transmit power limits. Technical standards referenced by CITA may include ITU Radio Regulations and relevant IEC/ETSI or equivalent national standards, though Mongolia's published technical standard library for radio equipment is still developing.
summary.zh: 投放蒙古国市场的无线电设备，须在CITA（通信和信息技术局）依据蒙古国国家无线电频率划分表划分和许可的频段内运行。蒙古国频率规划总体上参照独联体地区框架，受其历史基础设施及地处中俄之间的地理位置影响。2.4GHz ISM频段（2400–2483.5 MHz）通常可供Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11 b/g/n/ax）和蓝牙设备使用，无需单独频率许可，但设备须取得CITA型号核准。在5GHz频段，对应W52（5150–5250 MHz）和W53（5250–5350 MHz）的信道仅限室内使用，参照俄罗斯及独联体地区法规惯例；W56（5470–5725 MHz）可能在附加功率限制条件下获准使用。蜂窝频率（4G LTE和5G NR）由CITA向网络运营商颁发许可；须核验设备与蒙古国运营商频段的兼容性。设备发射功率不得超过CITA规定的限值。CITA参考的技术标准可能包括国际电信联盟无线电规则及相关IEC/ETSI或同等国家标准，但蒙古国针对无线电设备的已发布技术标准库仍在完善中。
summary.zht: 投放蒙古國市場的無線電設備，須在CITA（通信和信息技術局）依據蒙古國國家無線電頻率劃分表劃分和許可的頻段內運行。蒙古國頻率規劃總體上參照獨聯體地區框架，受其歷史基礎設施及地處中俄之間的地理位置影響。2.4GHz ISM頻段（2400–2483.5 MHz）通常可供Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11 b/g/n/ax）和藍牙設備使用，無需單獨頻率許可，但設備須取得CITA型號核准。在5GHz頻段，對應W52（5150–5250 MHz）和W53（5250–5350 MHz）的信道僅限室內使用，參照俄羅斯及獨聯體地區法規慣例；W56（5470–5725 MHz）可能在附加功率限制條件下獲准使用。蜂窩頻率（4G LTE和5G NR）由CITA向網路運營商頒發許可；須核驗設備與蒙古國運營商頻段的相容性。設備發射功率不得超過CITA規定的限值。CITA參考的技術標準可能包括國際電信聯盟無線電規則及相關IEC/ETSI或同等國家標準，但蒙古國針對無線電設備的已發布技術標準庫仍在完善中。

standards_or_laws: Law of Mongolia on Communications (as amended) — governs frequency allocation and licensing for radio equipment
Mongolia National Radiofrequency Allocation Table — administered by CITA; determines permitted frequency bands and power limits for radio devices
ITU Radio Regulations — referenced by CITA for international frequency coordination; Mongolia is an ITU member state

summary.en: In China, radio frequency conformity for wireless devices is governed by SRRC (State Radio Regulatory Commission of China) type approval under MIIT. The SRRC approval process evaluates transmit power, frequency band usage, and spurious emission limits against Chinese national standards (GB 15629.11 for Wi-Fi/WLAN, YD/T series for cellular, relevant SRRC technical specifications). China's 5 GHz Wi-Fi policy differs from Mongolia's: China permits W52, W53, and W56 channels with varying indoor/outdoor conditions under Chinese regulation — the specific restrictions applicable in Mongolia's CITA framework must be assessed independently. Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer to Mongolia; the underlying test data may be submitted as supporting reference during a CITA application, but Mongolia's CITA conducts its own evaluation against its national frequency allocation and technical requirements.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备的射频合规受工业和信息化部下属SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准管辖。SRRC核准流程依据中国国家标准（Wi-Fi/WLAN适用GB 15629.11，蜂窝适用YD/T系列，相关SRRC技术规范）评估发射功率、频段使用及杂散发射限值。中国5GHz Wi-Fi政策与蒙古国不同：中国在中国法规下依据不同室内/室外条件允许使用W52、W53和W56信道——蒙古国CITA框架下适用的具体限制须单独评估。中国SRRC核准不转移至蒙古国；测试数据底稿可在CITA申请中作为辅助参考资料提交，但蒙古国CITA依据本国频率划分和技术要求进行独立评估。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線設備的射頻合規受工業和信息化部下屬SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准管轄。SRRC核准流程依據中國國家標準（Wi-Fi/WLAN適用GB 15629.11，蜂窩適用YD/T系列，相關SRRC技術規範）評估發射功率、頻段使用及雜散發射限值。中國5GHz Wi-Fi政策與蒙古國不同：中國在中國法規下依據不同室內/室外條件允許使用W52、W53和W56信道——蒙古國CITA框架下適用的具體限制須單獨評估。中國SRRC核准不轉移至蒙古國；測試數據底稿可在CITA申請中作為輔助參考資料提交，但蒙古國CITA依據本國頻率劃分和技術要求進行獨立評估。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — State Radio Regulatory Commission of China (MIIT), mandatory for radio transmission equipment sold in China
GB 15629.11 — Information technology — LAN/MAN (Wi-Fi / WLAN standard, China)
MIIT Regulations on the Administration of Radio Spectrum (China) — governs transmit power and frequency band use for radio equipment in China

gap.en: Chinese SRRC radio frequency conformity certification is not recognised by CITA and cannot serve as a substitute for Mongolian frequency conformity under the CITA type approval process. Mongolia's CITA independently evaluates frequency band use, transmit power limits, and spurious emissions against Mongolia's national Radiofrequency Allocation Table. The 5 GHz W52/W53 indoor-only restriction in Mongolia may require product firmware configuration or documentation changes for devices marketed as outdoor-capable in China. Cellular band compatibility with Mongolia operator allocations (which differ from Chinese band plans for LTE and 5G NR) must be verified separately. Products must not be placed on the Mongolian market without a valid CITA type approval covering the relevant radio frequency parameters. Mongolia's regulatory documentation for radio standards is still developing, and applicants should engage CITA directly to confirm current technical submission requirements.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC射频合规认证不被CITA承认，不可替代CITA型号核准程序下的蒙古国频率合规。蒙古国CITA依据蒙古国国家无线电频率划分表，独立评估频段使用、发射功率限值及杂散发射。蒙古国5GHz W52/W53仅限室内的规定，可能要求针对在中国以支持室外使用为卖点的产品进行固件配置或文件修改。蜂窝频段与蒙古国运营商划分（与中国LTE和5G NR频段规划不同）的兼容性须单独核验。未取得覆盖相关射频参数的有效CITA型号核准，产品不得投放蒙古国市场。蒙古国无线电标准法规文件仍在完善中，申请人应直接与CITA联系以确认当前技术提交要求。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC射頻合規認證不被CITA承認，不可替代CITA型號核准程序下的蒙古國頻率合規。蒙古國CITA依據蒙古國國家無線電頻率劃分表，獨立評估頻段使用、發射功率限值及雜散發射。蒙古國5GHz W52/W53僅限室內的規定，可能要求針對在中國以支持室外使用為賣點的產品進行固件配置或文件修改。蜂窩頻段與蒙古國運營商劃分（與中國LTE和5G NR頻段規劃不同）的相容性須單獨核驗。未取得覆蓋相關射頻參數的有效CITA型號核准，產品不得投放蒙古國市場。蒙古國無線電標準法規文件仍在完善中，申請人應直接與CITA聯繫以確認當前技術提交要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CITA type approval covering radio frequency parameters required for all radio equipment sold in Mongolia; 5 GHz W52/W53 restricted to indoor use
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval required for all radio transmission equipment sold in China; 5 GHz regulations differ and must be assessed separately for Mongolia

source.publisher: CITA — Communications and Information Technology Authority of Mongolia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CITA type approval covering radio frequency parameters is mandatory for all wireless devices sold in Mongolia. Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer. Mongolia's 5 GHz W52/W53 channels are restricted to indoor use, which may require product or documentation changes. Cellular band compatibility with Mongolian operator allocations should be verified independently. Mongolia's radio regulatory documentation is developing — direct engagement with CITA is recommended for current submission requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 覆盖射频参数的CITA型号核准对所有在蒙古国销售的无线设备为强制要求。中国SRRC核准不转移适用。蒙古国5GHz W52/W53信道仅限室内使用，可能需要产品或文件变更。蜂窝频段与蒙古国运营商划分的兼容性须单独核验。蒙古国无线电监管文件仍在完善中——建议直接联系CITA了解当前提交要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 覆蓋射頻參數的CITA型號核准對所有在蒙古國銷售的無線設備為強制要求。中國SRRC核准不轉移適用。蒙古國5GHz W52/W53信道僅限室內使用，可能需要產品或文件變更。蜂窩頻段與蒙古國運營商劃分的相容性須單獨核驗。蒙古國無線電監管文件仍在完善中——建議直接聯繫CITA了解當前提交要求。

requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) — Mongolia National Requirements for Electronic Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——蒙古国电子设备国家要求
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——蒙古國電子設備國家要求

summary.en: Electronic and electrical equipment sold in Mongolia, including wireless and IoT devices, is subject to electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) requirements administered under the oversight of CITA and the Mongolian Communications Authority (MCA). Mongolia does not participate in the EAEU and is therefore not subject to the EAEU EMC technical regulation TR CU 020/2011; instead, Mongolia applies its own national framework which references international standards, principally ITU recommendations and IEC/CISPR publications, as the basis for EMC evaluation. Mongolia's standards body (MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology) has adopted a number of MNS (Mongolian National Standards) based on IEC and CISPR standards for electromagnetic emissions and immunity. In practice, EMC conformity for radio and telecommunications equipment in Mongolia is evaluated as part of the CITA type approval process rather than as a separately issued EMC certificate, making CITA type approval the primary gateway for EMC compliance as well. Equipment must not cause harmful interference to other radio services or devices operating in Mongolia, consistent with ITU Radio Regulations and CITA frequency management requirements.
summary.zh: 在蒙古国销售的电气和电子设备（包括无线及物联网设备）受CITA（通信和信息技术局）和蒙古国通信局（MCA）监管下的电磁兼容（EMC）要求约束。蒙古国不参与EAEU，因此不受EAEU EMC技术法规TR CU 020/2011约束；蒙古国采用自身国家框架，以国际标准（主要是国际电信联盟建议书及IEC/CISPR出版物）作为EMC评估依据。蒙古国标准机构（MASM——蒙古国标准与计量局）已采纳若干基于IEC和CISPR标准的MNS（蒙古国国家标准），用于电磁发射和抗扰度评估。实践中，蒙古国无线电和电信设备的EMC合格评定作为CITA型号核准程序的一部分进行，而非单独颁发EMC证书，因此CITA型号核准也是EMC合规的主要门槛。设备不得对蒙古国境内其他无线电业务或设备造成有害干扰，须符合国际电信联盟无线电规则和CITA频率管理要求。
summary.zht: 在蒙古國銷售的電氣和電子設備（包括無線及物聯網設備）受CITA（通信和信息技術局）和蒙古國通信局（MCA）監管下的電磁相容（EMC）要求約束。蒙古國不參與EAEU，因此不受EAEU EMC技術法規TR CU 020/2011約束；蒙古國採用自身國家框架，以國際標準（主要是國際電信聯盟建議書及IEC/CISPR出版物）作為EMC評估依據。蒙古國標準機構（MASM——蒙古國標準與計量局）已採納若干基於IEC和CISPR標準的MNS（蒙古國國家標準），用於電磁發射和抗擾度評估。實踐中，蒙古國無線電和電信設備的EMC合格評定作為CITA型號核准程序的一部分進行，而非單獨頒發EMC證書，因此CITA型號核准也是EMC合規的主要門檻。設備不得對蒙古國境內其他無線電業務或設備造成有害干擾，須符合國際電信聯盟無線電規則和CITA頻率管理要求。

standards_or_laws: Law of Mongolia on Communications (as amended) — prohibits harmful radio interference; CITA type approval covers EMC evaluation for radio and telecom equipment

MNS (Mongolian National Standards) based on IEC/CISPR series — Mongolia adopts selected IEC/CISPR standards via MASM (Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology) for electromagnetic emission and immunity
ITU Radio Regulations — referenced by CITA for protection of radio services from electromagnetic interference; Mongolia is an ITU member state

summary.en: China's mandatory EMC regime for electronic equipment is enforced through the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme using GB/T 9254 (Information Technology Equipment — radio disturbance characteristics, aligned with CISPR 22/32) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2). For wireless devices, EMC is also partially addressed in SRRC type approval and MIIT NAL testing. Chinese CCC EMC certification to GB/T 9254 and GB 17625.1 is not recognised by CITA or MASM as equivalent to Mongolian requirements. While the underlying IEC/CISPR technical basis is similar, formal recognition requires evaluation within Mongolia's national regulatory framework. CE EMC marking (EU Directive 2014/30/EU) is similarly not recognised in Mongolia.
summary.zh: 中国针对电子设备的强制性电磁兼容制度通过CCC（中国强制认证）体系执行，采用标准GB/T 9254（信息技术设备辐射，与CISPR 22/32接轨）和GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射，与IEC 61000-3-2接轨）。对于无线设备，电磁兼容性也部分涵盖于SRRC型号核准和工业和信息化部NAL测试中。依据GB/T 9254和GB 17625.1进行的中国CCC电磁兼容认证不被CITA或MASM视为等同于蒙古国要求。尽管基础IEC/CISPR技术依据相近，正式认可须在蒙古国国家监管框架内进行评估。欧盟EMC标志（欧盟指令2014/30/EU）同样不在蒙古国获得承认。
summary.zht: 中國針對電子設備的強制性電磁相容制度通過CCC（中國強制認證）體系執行，採用標準GB/T 9254（信息技術設備輻射，與CISPR 22/32接軌）和GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射，與IEC 61000-3-2接軌）。對於無線設備，電磁相容性也部分涵蓋於SRRC型號核准和工業和信息化部NAL測試中。依據GB/T 9254和GB 17625.1進行的中國CCC電磁相容認證不被CITA或MASM視為等同於蒙古國要求。儘管基礎IEC/CISPR技術依據相近，正式認可須在蒙古國國家監管框架內進行評估。歐盟EMC標誌（歐盟指令2014/30/EU）同樣不在蒙古國獲得承認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information Technology Equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics (CCC, aligned with CISPR 22/32)
GB 17625.1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (CCC, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA, mandatory EMC certification for in-scope IT and AV equipment sold in China

gap.en: Chinese CCC EMC certification (GB/T 9254, GB 17625.1) is not formally recognised in Mongolia and does not substitute for Mongolian EMC conformity. In Mongolia, EMC conformity for radio and telecommunications devices is assessed as part of the CITA type approval process; there is currently no separate standalone EMC certificate regime equivalent to EAC TR CU 020/2011. CE EMC marking is also not recognised. The applicable IEC/CISPR-based test methods may be similar, but Mongolia's CITA type approval submission must include documentation addressing EMC emission and immunity performance in accordance with CITA's technical requirements. Mongolia's MASM is the national standards body for MNS adoption of IEC/CISPR standards; applicants should confirm with CITA and MASM which specific MNS standards are currently mandated for EMC evaluation of wireless and IoT devices, as Mongolia's standard library is still developing.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电磁兼容认证（GB/T 9254、GB 17625.1）在蒙古国不获正式承认，不可替代蒙古国EMC合规。在蒙古国，无线电和电信设备的EMC合规作为CITA型号核准程序的一部分进行评估；目前没有类似EAEU TR CU 020/2011的独立EMC证书制度。欧盟EMC标志同样不被承认。适用的基于IEC/CISPR的测试方法可能相近，但蒙古国CITA型号核准申请材料须包含依据CITA技术要求说明EMC发射和抗扰度性能的文件。蒙古国MASM是负责采纳IEC/CISPR标准为MNS标准的国家标准机构；申请人应向CITA和MASM确认目前对无线及物联网设备EMC评估强制适用的具体MNS标准，因蒙古国标准库仍在完善中。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電磁相容認證（GB/T 9254、GB 17625.1）在蒙古國不獲正式承認，不可替代蒙古國EMC合規。在蒙古國，無線電和電信設備的EMC合規作為CITA型號核准程序的一部分進行評估；目前沒有類似EAEU TR CU 020/2011的獨立EMC證書制度。歐盟EMC標誌同樣不被承認。適用的基於IEC/CISPR的測試方法可能相近，但蒙古國CITA型號核准申請材料須包含依據CITA技術要求說明EMC發射和抗擾度性能的文件。蒙古國MASM是負責採納IEC/CISPR標準為MNS標準的國家標準機構；申請人應向CITA和MASM確認目前對無線及物聯網設備EMC評估強制適用的具體MNS標準，因蒙古國標準庫仍在完善中。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC conformity evaluated as part of CITA type approval for radio and telecom devices in Mongolia; no separate standalone EMC certificate regime currently equivalent to EAC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC EMC certification to GB/T 9254 and GB 17625.1 required for in-scope IT and AV equipment sold in China

source.publisher: CITA — Communications and Information Technology Authority of Mongolia; MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC conformity for wireless and IoT devices in Mongolia is assessed within the CITA type approval process; there is no separate standalone national EMC certificate scheme equivalent to EAC TR CU 020/2011. Chinese CCC EMC and CE EMC markings are not recognised. CITA type approval submissions must address electromagnetic emission and immunity performance. Applicants should confirm the specific MNS standards currently required for EMC assessment directly with CITA and MASM, as Mongolia's regulatory library is still developing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 蒙古国无线及物联网设备的EMC合规在CITA型号核准程序内进行评估；目前没有类似EAC TR CU 020/2011的独立国家EMC证书制度。中国CCC EMC认证和欧盟CE EMC标志不被承认。CITA型号核准申请须涉及电磁发射和抗扰度性能。申请人应直接向CITA和MASM确认当前EMC评估所需的具体MNS标准，因蒙古国法规库仍在完善中。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙古國無線及物聯網設備的EMC合規在CITA型號核准程序內進行評估；目前沒有類似EAC TR CU 020/2011的獨立國家EMC證書制度。中國CCC EMC認證和歐盟CE EMC標誌不被承認。CITA型號核准申請須涉及電磁發射和抗擾度性能。申請人應直接向CITA和MASM確認當前EMC評估所需的具體MNS標準，因蒙古國法規庫仍在完善中。
